name: Gassy Furry Fighting Club
description:
"Alright Ladies & Gentleman, our next match is starting soon! Keep your noses plugged and your eyes wide open because this one will blow you away!"

Have you ever wanted to participate in a secret underground tournament where the main idea is to slam your ass down on your opponent and use any dirty tricks till they tap out? No? Well, have you ever wanted to watch one instead? ...Still no?

Well, then you should get out of here because this place is only for competitors & fans with a taste for massive flatulent asses! Come one, come all (If you have the clearance to anyway) and watch the amazing showdowns!

[I know I've been doing a lot of bots in rapid succession. If anyone has requests or suggestions, I have a suggestion bot on my profile. And as always, here's an extra image below for those who wanna look at it.]
